mapper.sql: id, batch_id, sheet_name, row_no, column_name, field_name, raw_value, error_type, error_msg, create_time
mapper.select: select from biz_import_error_log where batch_id = #{batchId} order by row_no asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into biz_import_error_log (batch_id, sheet_name, row_no, column_name, field_name, raw_value, error_type, error_msg, create_time) values (#{batchId}, #{sheetName}, #{rowNo}, #{columnName}, #{fieldName}, #{rawValue}, #{errorType}, #{errorMsg}, now())

insert into biz_import_error_log (batch_id, sheet_name, row_no, column_name, field_name, raw_value, error_type, error_msg, create_time) values
(#{e.batchId}, #{e.sheetName}, #{e.rowNo}, #{e.columnName}, #{e.fieldName}, #{e.rawValue}, #{e.errorType}, #{e.errorMsg}, now())
